policy.note: This guard validates the owner answer sheet contract only. It never records decisions or changes source/session files.

findings.message: Answer sheet status must be owner_answer_sheet_ready.
Answer sheet must not record decisions.
Answer sheet must not write session files.
Answer sheet must keep public_ready_after_sheet at 0.
Answer sheet summary must keep public_ready_after_sheet at 0.
Source ref present: examples/kosmo-references/provenance/source-root-decision-session-2026-06-16.json
Source ref present: data/kosmo-owner-review-card-set-2026-06-16.json
Source ref present: examples/kosmo-references/provenance/owner-review-decision-session-2026-06-13.json
Source-root section must exist.
Source-root allowed decisions must match the decision session.
Source-root safe default must stay keep_blocked.
Source-root selected decision must only reflect the session state.
Source-root selected path must only reflect the session state.
Source-root option count must match the decision session.
Answer sheet source-root option count must match session options.
Owner review card section must exist.
Owner card count must match the card set.
Answer sheet owner card summary must match section cards.
Answer sheet owner card item summary must match section cards.
Owner card batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates must keep public_ready_after_card at 0.
Owner card batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files must keep public_ready_after_card at 0.
Owner card batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation must keep public_ready_after_card at 0.
Owner card batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap must keep public_ready_after_card at 0.
Owner card batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews must keep public_ready_after_card at 0.
Reference decision section must exist.
Reference allowed decisions must match owner decision session.
Reference decision count must match owner decision session.
Answer sheet reference decision summary must match section decisions.
Reference decision villa-savoye-exterior-savoye-3-cc0 must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision villa-savoye-exterior-loc-full must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision villa-savoye-interior-chaise-cc-by-sa must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision public/archive-media/villa-savoye/exterior/villa-savoye-loc-exterior-crop.jpg must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision public/archive-media/villa-savoye/plan/villa-savoye-ground-floor-diagram.svg must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision public/archive-media/villa-savoye/section/villa-savoye-long-section-diagram.svg must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision public/archive-models/villa-savoye/low.glb must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision villa-savoye must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl must keep public_ready_after_decision false.
Reference decision sogn-benedetg-source-gap must keep public_ready_after_decision false.

next_actions: Do not copy answer fields into decision sessions until the owner explicitly confirms them.
After any explicit owner decision is recorded, rerun source-root/owner decision checks and the full data-lane sweep.
